title: Creation
summary: God creates the heavens and the earth and places humanity in Eden.

title: Fall of Humanity
summary: Humanity rebels against God and is expelled from Eden.

title: Cain and Abel
summary: Cain murders Abel and is judged by God.

title: The Flood
summary: God judges the world by flood and preserves Noah and his family.

title: Noahic Covenant
summary: God establishes covenant with Noah after the flood.

title: Tower of Babel
summary: Human pride at Babel leads to the confusion of languages.

title: Call of Abraham
summary: God calls Abram and promises to bless all nations through him.

title: Abrahamic Covenant
summary: God formalizes covenant promises with Abraham.

title: Destruction of Sodom
summary: God destroys Sodom while rescuing Lot.

title: Birth of Isaac
summary: Isaac is born as the child of promise.

title: Binding of Isaac
summary: Abraham is tested and God provides the ram.

title: Jacob at Bethel
summary: Jacob sees the ladder and receives covenant reassurance.

title: Jacob Wrestles at Peniel
summary: Jacob wrestles with God and is renamed Israel.

title: Joseph Sold into Egypt
summary: Joseph is sold by his brothers and taken to Egypt.

title: Joseph Rises in Egypt
summary: Joseph rises to power in Egypt and preserves many lives.

title: Jacob's Family Enters Egypt
summary: Jacob and his household settle in Egypt.

title: Birth of Moses
summary: Moses is born and preserved in Pharaoh's household.

title: Call of Moses
summary: God calls Moses at the burning bush to lead Israel out of Egypt.

title: The Ten Plagues
summary: God strikes Egypt with ten plagues.

title: Passover and Exodus
summary: Israel departs Egypt after the Passover judgment.

title: Crossing the Red Sea
summary: God parts the sea and saves Israel from Egypt.

title: Manna in the Wilderness
summary: God provides manna for Israel in the wilderness.

title: Covenant at Sinai
summary: God gives the law and covenant instructions at Sinai.

title: Golden Calf
summary: Israel worships the golden calf while Moses is on the mountain.

title: Tabernacle Completed
summary: The tabernacle is completed and God's glory fills it.

title: Twelve Spies Sent
summary: Israel refuses to enter the land after the spies' report.

title: Balaam and the Donkey
summary: God turns intended curses into blessing through Balaam.

title: Moses' Final Addresses
summary: Moses renews covenant and prepares Israel to enter the land.

title: Crossing the Jordan
summary: Israel crosses the Jordan into the promised land.

title: Fall of Jericho
summary: Jericho falls as Israel follows God's command.

title: Victory at Ai
summary: Israel defeats Ai after dealing with Achan's sin.

title: Sun Stands Still
summary: God gives Israel victory as the sun stands still.

title: Land Allotments
summary: The land is apportioned among the tribes.

title: Deborah and Barak
summary: Deborah leads Israel to victory over Sisera.

title: Gideon's Victory
summary: God delivers Israel through Gideon's reduced army.

title: Samson's Deliverance
summary: Samson judges Israel and confronts the Philistines.

title: Call of Samuel
summary: The Lord calls Samuel as prophet in Israel.

title: Ark Captured by Philistines
summary: The ark is captured, bringing judgment and fear.

title: Saul Anointed King
summary: Saul is chosen and presented as Israel's king.

title: David Anointed
summary: Samuel anoints David as future king.

title: David and Goliath
summary: David defeats Goliath in the name of the Lord.

title: David Takes Jerusalem
summary: David establishes Jerusalem as royal city.

title: Davidic Covenant
summary: God promises David an enduring house and kingdom.

title: Temple Built
summary: Solomon builds and dedicates the temple.

title: Kingdom Divides
summary: The kingdom divides into Israel and Judah.

title: Elijah at Carmel
summary: Elijah confronts the prophets of Baal on Mount Carmel.

title: Elisha's Ministry
summary: Elisha ministers with signs, healings, and counsel.

title: Jonah in Nineveh
summary: Jonah proclaims judgment and Nineveh repents.

title: Fall of Samaria
summary: The northern kingdom falls to Assyria.

title: Hezekiah and Assyria
summary: God delivers Jerusalem from Assyria in Hezekiah's days.

title: Josiah's Reform
summary: Josiah renews covenant after the law book is found.

title: Fall of Jerusalem
summary: Jerusalem and the temple are destroyed by Babylon.

title: Daniel in Babylon
summary: Daniel serves faithfully in Babylon and receives visions.

title: Ezekiel's Visions
summary: Ezekiel sees God's glory among the exiles.

title: Return from Exile
summary: Exiles return and begin rebuilding the temple.

title: Second Temple Completed
summary: The rebuilt temple is completed and dedicated.

title: Deliverance in Esther
summary: God preserves his people through Esther's courage.

title: Rebuilding Jerusalem Walls
summary: Nehemiah leads the rebuilding of Jerusalem's walls.

title: Malachi's Rebuke
summary: Malachi calls post-exilic Judah to covenant faithfulness.

title: Birth of Jesus
summary: Jesus is born in Bethlehem.

title: Baptism of Jesus
summary: Jesus is baptized and publicly affirmed.

title: Temptation in the Wilderness
summary: Jesus withstands temptation in the wilderness.

title: Sermon on the Mount
summary: Jesus teaches the ethics of the kingdom.

title: Feeding the Five Thousand
summary: Jesus miraculously feeds the crowd.

title: Transfiguration
summary: Jesus is transfigured before selected disciples.

title: Raising of Lazarus
summary: Jesus raises Lazarus from the dead.

title: Triumphal Entry
summary: Jesus enters Jerusalem as king.

title: Last Supper
summary: Jesus shares the final Passover meal with his disciples.

title: Crucifixion of Jesus
summary: Jesus is crucified outside Jerusalem.

title: Resurrection of Jesus
summary: Jesus rises from the dead.

title: Great Commission
summary: Jesus commissions his followers to make disciples of all nations.

title: Ascension of Jesus
summary: Jesus ascends and promises the Spirit.

title: Pentecost
summary: The Spirit comes at Pentecost and the church expands.

title: Stephen's Martyrdom
summary: Stephen is martyred and persecution scatters believers.

title: Conversion of Paul
summary: Saul encounters the risen Christ on the road to Damascus.

title: Cornelius Receives the Gospel
summary: The gospel is clearly extended to Gentiles.

title: Jerusalem Council
summary: The church affirms Gentile inclusion without full Torah conversion.

title: Macedonian Call
summary: Paul is directed by a vision to take the gospel into Macedonia.

title: Paul in Athens
summary: Paul addresses the Areopagus in Athens.

title: Paul in Ephesus
summary: Paul's ministry deeply impacts Ephesus and the surrounding region.

title: Paul Before Felix and Agrippa
summary: Paul testifies before rulers while imprisoned.

title: Paul's Shipwreck
summary: Paul survives shipwreck on the way to Rome.

title: Paul Arrives in Rome
summary: Paul reaches Rome and continues proclaiming the kingdom.
